reviews.review_description: Game's cool and all right but they got glitches like when you grab the flashlight it stretches and and flat and then my hands on my right side finger starts stretching real long and the flashlight goes flat and stretch out so that's a glitch that you need to be fixed in my flashlight  not working please fix and as far as I got had a hard time picking up the fire extinguisher when I pick it up it fell on my hand and disappeared it's kind of clunky trying to pick it up and the flashlight doesn't work and that's why I keep getting stuck at once I get to right there it don't do nothing else I'm kind of just wondering around in the room this game need a major update
